title: Rewrite reports module using parameterized SQL
prompt:
Below is an analytics module that uses `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query/3` with direct SQL string interpolation on `id`. Rewrite the module so (a) `find_by_id/1` uses parameterized SQL via `$1` placeholder, and (b) add a second `product_by_id/1` that uses the Ecto DSL (`from p in Product, where: p.id == ^id`). Both functions must accept the same `id` argument.

```elixir
defmodule MyApp.Reports do
  alias MyApp.Repo

  def find_by_id(id) do
    {:ok, %{rows: rows}} =
      Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query(Repo, "SELECT * FROM products WHERE id = #{id}")
    rows
  end
end
```

Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app/reports.ex`.
tier_rationale: Medium — two related fixes, one via $1 parameter placeholder and one via Ecto DSL.
